description: F4 - Canon divergence: player explicitly diverges from source canon

messages.content: What anime world and character are you envisioning?

Attack on Titan, but I want to play in a timeline where the Rumbling never happened. Eren Yeager found a third option — he sealed the titans in an alternate dimension permanently, but at the cost of his titan powers. He's now just a regular human, living under a false name in Marley, trying to build a quiet life.
Interesting divergence! What does Eren want in this timeline?
He wants to just be left alone. He's done with history-making. But people keep finding him — some to thank him, some to kill him. The world thinks he's dead.
A small bakery in an ordinary Marleyan town. He runs it as 'Ren'. It's been three years since the dimensional sealing. Today a Paradis intelligence officer walks through the door.

character_draft.name: Eren Yeager (as Ren)
character_draft.concept: Former world-shaper hiding as a baker, hunted by his own history
